disclaimer: Not financial advice. High-leverage crypto futures carry a high risk of total loss. Never risk money you can't afford to lose.
start_welcome:
👋 Welcome to Lifechange Crypto VIP.

🔓 This is the inside room: live trade ideas, entries, leverage, SL and TP levels, and the reasoning behind each one — for education, so you can learn to read the market yourself.

👉 Pick your language to continue.
start_welcome_edu:
📊 Welcome to Lifechange Crypto.

We help you learn to read crypto futures with data — funding rates, liquidations, on-chain flows — explained simply, with transparent and verifiable analysis. No hype, no empty promises.

Educational content only — not financial advice. Crypto trading carries a high risk of loss.

👉 Pick your language to start.
edu_menu_header:
✅ You're all set.

Start with our free channel — daily market breakdowns: funding, liquidations, key levels, explained simply. No cost, no hype.

When you want full access later, the VIP options are below. 👇
language_set: ✅ Language set to English. Let's get you set up.
main_menu_header:
🎯 How would you like to get in?

{disclaimer}
trial_intro:
🎟 Free 30-day VIP trial — here's how it works:

1. Register on Bitunix using THIS link (it has to be our link, that's how we recognize you):
{referral_link}

2. Fund your account with at least {min_balance} USDT (this stays your money — it's your trading capital, not a fee to us).

3. Send me your Bitunix UID (open the app → Profile → tap your UID to copy it).

📌 Note: Bitunix is an exchange we partner with. It is not licensed or regulated. Trading is educational and entirely at your own risk.
trial_ask_uid: 👉 Send me your Bitunix UID now — numbers only (for example: 88761234).
trial_bad_uid_format: That doesn't look like a Bitunix UID. It should be numbers only, no spaces or letters. Open Bitunix → Profile → tap your UID to copy it, then paste it here.
trial_uid_already_used: That UID has already been used for a trial. Each Bitunix account gets one free trial, ever. If you think this is a mistake, contact support.
trial_uid_already_member:
✅ This UID is already active — it has live VIP access right now.

Lost your link, or switching to a different account? Tap below to get a fresh one. ⚠️ Heads up: the previous member on this UID will be removed — one UID = one member.
vip_access_transferred:
⚠️ A new access link was just issued for your Bitunix UID, so your old VIP link was switched off and you were removed from the room.

If that was you, just rejoin with your new link. If it wasn't, contact support.
trial_rate_limited: You're sending UIDs a bit fast. Please wait a few minutes and try again.
trial_checking: ⏳ Got it — checking your Bitunix account now. This takes a moment.
trial_ask_screenshot: 📌 Almost there. Send ONE screenshot that shows your Bitunix account registered under our code and your deposit. This helps us confirm it quickly.
trial_needs_manual: ⏳ Thanks — we've got your details and we're reviewing them manually now. This is usually quick (we clear the queue a couple of times a day). You'll get a message here the moment you're approved.
trial_rejected:
We couldn't verify a qualifying deposit under our referral link for that UID yet.

Make sure you: (1) registered with OUR link, and (2) have at least {min_balance} USDT currently in the account. Once that's done, send your UID again.
trial_need_proof: We need a clearer screenshot to confirm. Please send one image showing your Bitunix account (registered under our code) and your current balance.
paid_tier_menu_header:
💎 Choose your VIP plan (USDT):

Monthly keeps it flexible. Quarterly works out cheaper per month. Lifetime is one payment, in for good.
paid_invoice_expired: That invoice expired before payment. No problem — tap a plan again to get a fresh one.
vip_welcome_dm:
🚀 You're in. Welcome to the Lifechange Crypto VIP room.

What to do first:
📌 Turn on notifications for the group so you don't miss live entries.
📈 Read each idea fully — entry zone, leverage, SL and TP are there for a reason.
🛡 Manage your own risk on every position. Size small while you learn.

Everything here is shared for education — to help you learn to trade, not as a promise of any outcome.
admin_action_approved: Approved trial #{id}. User notified and invite sent.
admin_action_needproof: Asked user for better proof on trial #{id}.
admin_action_already_done: Trial #{id} was already decided. No change.
admin_queue_empty: ✅ Queue is clear — no trials waiting.
admin_token_expired_alert: Heads up: the Bitunix partner token looks expired or errored ({reason}). Auto-verify is falling back to manual review. Refresh BITUNIX_PARTNER_TOKEN when you can.
cadence_welcome:
🎟 You're inside the room most people only ever see screenshots of.

30 days, full access — every entry, the leverage, the SL and TP, and the exact reasoning behind each call. Don't sleep on it:
📲 Turn on notifications so you never miss a live entry.
📖 Read every idea in full — that's where the edge is.

The clock's already running. Make these 30 days count.
cadence_day7:
📅 One week in.

By now you've seen it with your own eyes — levels, timing and exits mapped out BEFORE the move, not after. That's the part 99% of "signal" channels will never show you.

23 days of free access left. After that you're back to reading the chart alone, in the dark. Just sit with that for a second. 👀
cadence_mid:
⏳ Halfway through your free access. Be honest with yourself for a second:

Has this room changed how you read the chart? Caught setups you'd have walked straight past on your own?

When the trial ends, that stops — and you're back to guessing alone. You don't have to let that happen. Lock your seat in now and never feel the gap 👇
cadence_warn3d:
⚠️ 3 days left. Then the door shuts.

Here's the part that stings: the room doesn't stop when your trial does. The live calls keep dropping — entries, exits, all of it. You just won't be in here to see them.

The market doesn't wait. Neither does this room. Stay in 👇
cadence_lastday:
🚨 This is it — your access ends TODAY.

Tomorrow you're on the outside, watching screenshots of calls you could've been in, live. Don't be the one who had the keys to the room and let them slip through their fingers.

Last chance to keep your seat 👇
cadence_winback:
🔒 You're out. Your VIP access ended and you've been removed from the room.

Right now, in there, the next entry is being called. Every level, every exit — live. Without you.

The door isn't locked, though. Walk back in the second you're ready 👇
warm1:
👀 You opened the door… and just stood there.

The VIP room is dropping live entries right now — exact levels, the reasoning, the exits. You were one tap from being in it.

Don't overthink it: grab VIP with USDT and you're inside in two taps 👇
(Prefer the free-trial route? It's there too — set up Bitunix and get 30 days on us.)
warm2:
⏳ Still on the fence?

While you've been thinking it over, the room hasn't stopped — every entry, every exit, called live. The people inside aren't sharper than you. They just stopped hesitating.

Lock in VIP with USDT — instant access, zero setup 👇
warm3:
🚪 Last nudge, then I'll leave you be.

Here's the honest truth: the ones who get in are the ones who stop "thinking about it" and actually move. The room's been sitting right in front of you for a week.

VIP. USDT. Instant. This is the part where you decide 👇
expired_removed_renew: 🔓 Your VIP access has expired, so you've been removed from the group. Renew any time from the menu to rejoin.
cancelled: Cancelled. Open the menu any time with /start.
error_try_again: Something went wrong on our end. Please try again in a moment.
not_entitled: You don't have active VIP access right now. Open /start to begin a trial or subscribe.
trial_already_active: You already have active VIP access. 🎟
